summary: The test suite is comprehensive and well-structured, covering all six major requirements: retry with exponential backoff (Invoke-RestMethodWithRetry), file-based caching (Write/Read/Clear-Cache), post fetching (Get-Posts), comment fetching (Get-Comments), pagination (Get-PaginatedPosts), and orchestration (Get-PostsWithComments), plus a dedicated error-handling block. Every public function has its own Describe with multiple Context blocks for happy path, empty responses, and caching behavior. Retry logic is tested for first-attempt success, transient failures, exhausted retries, and exact exponential backoff millisecond values. Fixtures are clean PSCustomObjects defined once at script scope and reused across tests. Mocks are correctly scoped with -ModuleName, temporary directories are isolated per test suite and cleaned up in AfterAll, and BeforeEach resets mutable state. Minor rigor gaps include: no test for malformed/corrupt cache JSON, no test for MaxRetries=0 or MaxPosts=0 boundary values, no test that cache directory is auto-created on first write, and no test distinguishing timeout from HTTP error types. The $script: fixture variables are defined outside BeforeAll blocks which is a minor Pester anti-pattern but works in practice. Overall this is a high-quality suite that would reliably catch regressions across all specified behaviors.
